title: geography — field classification
description: Reference-catalog data is public. IP addresses (in the geolocate cache key + audit) are personal data under GDPR.

restricted: GeolocationData.ip — personal data under GDPR Art. 4(1). Used only as cache key; never persisted alongside user_id or tenant_id.
audit_log: audit_log.geography.* rows for platform-admin catalog edits

notes: The IP in GeolocationData is echoed back to the caller because the caller submitted it (auth'd endpoint). It is never LOGGED with user_id + tenant_id in the same row — the response cache key includes IP but the key itself is not audit material.
Latitude / longitude coming out of geolocate are coarse (city-level precision, ~1 km accuracy_radius). We do not surface street-level coordinates.
